head.hi: List of persons now resident in the legation of the United States in Asuncion,

div.p: The minister, wife, and child; Mrs. Leite Pereira; Carlos Meincke, private secretary; Kate Leahy; George F. Masterman, medical attendant; Porter C. Bliss, translator; George Hamilton, Baltazar Carreras, Bazilio Jara, Melchora Jara, Lucia Rivas, (lavandera.)
